context_boundaries.core_topic: - The update tool has to run in the Command Prompt, and Command Prompt has to run as Administrator.To run as Administrator, please right-click “Command Prompt” and click “Run as administrator - Please enter the following path: thinkvision_p49w_30_fw1_5_tool_1_0_20250716\thinkvision_p49w_30_fw1_5_tool_1_0\pkg\Monitor\Genesys - The command to update the Hub firmware using the provided batch file is: - The command to update the Scaler firmware using the provided batch file is:
